---
name: Component request
about: Propose a new component.
title: ''
labels: component-request
assignees: ''
---

## The component

Name and a one-sentence description of what it does.

## Why it earns a slot

One paragraph. Who builds this and why. A concrete use case from a real TUI is worth more than a category argument.

## Prior art

Links to the same component in other libraries (shadcn/ui, Charm bracelet, ratatui-widgets, Textual, ink). What works there; what you'd change.

## States to render

Three to five canonical states the story file should cover (idle, focused, loading, empty, error, etc.).

## Open questions

Anything you're not sure about: API shape, theme tokens needed, framework constraints. Skip the section if you're confident.
